name: StoreGenerationAndArtifactManifest
description: Authoritative generation metadata and immutable manifest for complete financial, evidence, reconciliation, dimension, and idempotency state.
schema_def: store_generation: generationId, schemaVersion, reconciliationPolicyVersions, createdAt, createdByVersion, candidate|current|retained, verificationFingerprint. artifact_manifest: generationId, database/sidecar checksums, permissions, durable counts, exact movement/spend and pool-category checksums, transfer/refund conservation, category hierarchy acyclicity/ancestry, transaction replacement, dimension carry-forward or unknown initialization, relationship-replacement chain, evidence identity/link, reconciliation current-state/statement-authority, coverage, payment attribution, pool cardinality, idempotency, integrity, and foreign-key checks. CURRENT is an owner-private atomically replaced pointer; ephemeral query snapshots are excluded.
